steps: The D&D 2024 character builder family (dnd-build, dnd-check, dnd-lookup, dnd-help) is scoped to level 1 only.
You requested a level 5 Ranger with Beast Master subclass, which is outside the catalog's scope.
The catalog in data/*.json models only level 1 character creation.
Level-up mechanics (level 2-20) are 'Manquant documentaire' (missing from documentation).
To get help: you could build a level 1 Ranger with dnd-build, then note that further advancement requires external resources beyond this builder.
